name: Performance Degradation Response
description: Responds to performance degradation alerts by collecting system metrics, using AI to diagnose the bottleneck (CPU, memory, I/O, or network), and then routing to the appropriate remediation path. Resource exhaustion triggers auto-scaling or process optimization. Persistent issues that cannot be automatically resolved are escalated with a full diagnostic report for manual investigation.
author: T1 Agentics

required_integrations.name: Datadog
required_integrations.reason: Collect detailed system metrics for performance diagnosis

required_integrations.name: AWS Auto Scaling
required_integrations.reason: Trigger auto-scaling actions for resource-constrained services

required_integrations.name: Jira
required_integrations.reason: Create incident tickets for persistent performance issues requiring manual investigation

required_integrations.name: Slack
required_integrations.reason: Notify the infrastructure team of performance issues and remediation actions

config.description: Triggers when a performance degradation, high latency, or resource exhaustion alert is received
Collect CPU, memory, I/O, network, and load metrics for the affected host over the past 30 minutes

config.additional_instructions: Analyze the system metrics to identify the performance bottleneck. Determine if the issue is CPU-bound, memory-bound, I/O-bound, or network-bound. Recommend whether auto-scaling, process optimization, or manual investigation is the best remediation path.
config.description: AI-powered performance diagnosis identifying the root cause bottleneck and recommending remediation strategy
Determine if the AI recommends auto-scaling as the appropriate remediation
Scale out the affected service group to handle the increased resource demand
Notify the infrastructure team that auto-scaling was triggered for the performance issue
Create a detailed incident ticket with full diagnostic data for manual investigation
Notify the infrastructure team that the performance issue requires manual investigation
